action.reasoning: Observation: All checkpoints have val_acc ~0.59-0.60 on noisy val set. cleanlab_best.pt has highest val_acc (0.6018). Best test accuracy was 80.32% with best.pt. Time critically low (~8 min). Analysis: Ensembling multiple trained models by averaging logits is the most reliable way to boost accuracy with no training time. cleanlab_best.pt likely has better clean-label accuracy than best.pt despite similar noisy val_acc. Decision: Create ensemble predict.py that averages logits from cleanlab_best.pt + warmup_v1.pt + best_v2.pt + best.pt, submit eval with cleanlab_best.pt as primary checkpoint.
action.command: python -c "import torch; ckpt=torch.load('checkpoints/cleanlab_best.pt', map_location='cpu', weights_only=False); print('val_acc:', ckpt.get('val_acc'), 'epoch:', ckpt.get('epoch'))"
